title: Modeling soil bacterial diversity: challenges and opportunities.
author_string: Luan, Lu, Dini-Andreote, Francisco, Sun, Bo, Jiang, Yuji
abstract: Understanding the mechanisms structuring soil bacterial diversity has critical implications to advance the parametrization of species distribution models. This forum article discusses recent advances in the use of the metabolic theory of ecology applicable to soil microbiology, and highlights challenges and opportunities to inform future empirical and theoretical studies.
